  File csi2_ecc_rx.v
    21                                               module csi2_ecc_rx (
    22                                               
    23                                                   input  wire        i_clk,
    24                                                   input  wire        i_rst,
    25                                                   input  wire        i_header_valid,
    26                                                   input  wire [31:0] i_received_header,
    27                                               
    28                                                   output reg  [25:0] o_corrected_header,
    29                                                   output reg         o_single_bit_error,
    30                                                   output reg         o_double_bit_error,
    31                                                   output reg         o_header_valid,
    32                                               
    33                                                   // Debug
    34                                                   output wire [5:0]  o_ecc_rx,
    35                                                   output wire [5:0]  o_ecc_calc,
    36                                                   output wire [5:0]  o_syndrome,
    37                                                   output reg  [5:0]  o_error_index
    38                                               );
    39                                               
    40                                                   wire [25:0] d_rx;
    41                                                   wire [5:0]  ecc_rx;
    42                                                   wire [5:0]  ecc_calc;
    43                                                   wire [5:0]  syndrome;
    44                                               
    45                                                   reg  [25:0] d_corr;
    46                                                   reg         single_err;
    47                                                   reg         double_err;
    48                                               
    49                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    50                                                   // Header bit extraction ? must match MIPI CSI-2 spec D[23:0] layout:
    51                                                   //
    52                                                   //  i_received_header[31:0] = {ECC_byte, WC_HI, WC_LO, DI}
    53                                                   //   [31:24] = ECC_byte = {2'b00, ECC[5:0]}  -> ECC bits are [29:24]
    54                                                   //   [23:16] = WC_HI  = WC[15:8]             -> D[23:16]
    55                                                   //   [15:8]  = WC_LO  = WC[7:0]              -> D[15:8]
    56                                                   //   [7:0]   = DI     = {VC[1:0], DT[5:0]}   -> D[7:0]
    57                                                   //
    58                                                   //  ECC equations use i_header_data where:
    59                                                   //   [7:0]   = D[7:0]  = DI  = {VC, DT}
    60                                                   //   [15:8]  = D[15:8] = WC_LO
    61                                                   //   [23:16] = D[23:16]= WC_HI
    62                                                   //   [25:24] = 2'b00
    63                                                   //  So d_rx must be {2'b00, i_received_header[23:0]} to match exactly.
    64                                                   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    65                                                   assign ecc_rx = i_received_header[29:24];                    // ECC_byte[5:0]
    66                                                   // FIX: Reverse the slice order to match {2'b00, WC_HI, WC_LO, DI}
    67                                                   assign d_rx = {i_received_header[31:30], i_received_header[23:16], i_received_header[15:8], i_received_header[7:0]};
    68                                                   assign o_ecc_rx   = ecc_rx;
    69                                                   assign o_ecc_calc = ecc_calc;
    70                                                   assign o_syndrome = syndrome;
    71                                               
    72                                                   // -------- ECC RECALC (same as TX) --------
    73              1                        171         assign ecc_calc[0] = d_rx[0]^d_rx[1]^d_rx[2]^d_rx[4]^d_rx[5]^d_rx[7]^d_rx[10]^d_rx[11]^d_rx[13]^d_rx[16]^d_rx[20]^d_rx[21]^d_rx[22]^d_rx[23]^d_rx[24];
    74              1                        169         assign ecc_calc[1] = d_rx[0]^d_rx[1]^d_rx[3]^d_rx[4]^d_rx[6]^d_rx[8]^d_rx[10]^d_rx[12]^d_rx[14]^d_rx[17]^d_rx[20]^d_rx[21]^d_rx[22]^d_rx[23]^d_rx[25];
    75              1                        169         assign ecc_calc[2] = d_rx[0]^d_rx[2]^d_rx[3]^d_rx[5]^d_rx[6]^d_rx[9]^d_rx[11]^d_rx[12]^d_rx[15]^d_rx[18]^d_rx[20]^d_rx[21]^d_rx[22]; // FIX: removed d_rx[23]
    76              1                        116         assign ecc_calc[3] = d_rx[1]^d_rx[2]^d_rx[3]^d_rx[7]^d_rx[8]^d_rx[9]^d_rx[13]^d_rx[14]^d_rx[15]^d_rx[19]^d_rx[20]^d_rx[21]^d_rx[23]^d_rx[24]^d_rx[25]; // FIX: removed d_rx[22]

    79

    Line         Item                      Count     Source

  File crc_rx.v
    8                                                module crc_rx (
    9                                                    input          clk,
    10                                                   input          reset_n,
    11                                                   input          crc_en,
    12                                                   input          i_data_valid,
    13                                                   input  [7:0]   i_data_in,
    14                                                   input          i_start,
    15                                                   input          i_end,
    16                                                   output reg     o_crc_ok,
    17                                                   output reg     o_crc_done
    18                                               );
    19                                               
    20                                                   reg  [15:0] crc_reg;
    21                                                   reg  [1:0]  crc_state;
    22                                                   reg  [7:0]  rx_lsb;
    23                                               
    24                                                   // --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    25                                                   // Combinational: compute next CRC value
    26                                                   // Use a 16-entry shift register array to avoid W415a on crc_temp
    27                                                   // --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    28                                                   integer     i;
    29                                                   reg [15:0]  crc_pipe [0:8];   // pipeline: crc_pipe[0]=seed, crc_pipe[8]=result
    30                                                   reg [7:0]   data_pipe[0:8];   // same for data_byte shifting
    31                                               
    32              1                   14733619         always @(*) begin
    33                                                       // Stage 0: seed selection
    34              1                   14733619             crc_pipe[0]  = i_start ? 16'hFFFF : crc_reg;
    35              1                   14733619             data_pipe[0] = i_data_in;
    36                                               
    37                                                       // Stages 1-8: one bit per stage, no signal written twice
    38              1                   14733619             for (i = 0; i < 8; i = i + 1) begin
    38              2                  117868952     
    39                                                           if ((crc_pipe[i][0] ^ data_pipe[i][0]) == 1'b1)
    40              1                   58921598                     crc_pipe[i+1]  = (crc_pipe[i] >> 1) ^ 16'h8408;
    41                                                           else
    42              1                   58947354                     crc_pipe[i+1]  = crc_pipe[i] >> 1;
    43              1                  117868952                 data_pipe[i+1] = data_pipe[i] >> 1;
    44                                                       end
    45                                                   end
    46                                               
    47              1                   14725689         wire [15:0] crc_next = crc_pipe[8];   // final result
    48                                               
    49                                                   // --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    50                                                   // Sequential: register updates only
    51                                                   // --------------------------------------------------------------------------
    52              1                    9695205         always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
    53                                                       if (!reset_n) begin
    54              1                        218                 crc_reg    <= 16'hFFFF;
    55              1                        218                 crc_state  <= 2'd0;
    56              1                        218                 o_crc_ok   <= 1'b0;
    57              1                        218                 o_crc_done <= 1'b0;
    58              1                        218                 rx_lsb     <= 8'h00;
    59                                               
    60                                                       end else if (!crc_en) begin
    61              1                    4619661                 crc_reg    <= 16'hFFFF;
    62              1                    4619661                 crc_state  <= 2'd0;
    63              1                    4619661                 o_crc_ok   <= 1'b0;
    64              1                    4619661                 o_crc_done <= 1'b0;
    65              1                    4619661                 rx_lsb     <= 8'h00;
    66                                               
    67                                                       end else begin
    68              1                    5075326                 o_crc_done <= 1'b0;
    69              1                    5075326                 o_crc_ok   <= 1'b0;
    70                                               
    71                                                           // STATE 0: Payload processing
    72                                                           if (i_data_valid && (crc_state == 2'd0 || i_start)) begin
    73              1                    5051002                     o_crc_ok <= 1'b0;
    74              1                    5051002                     crc_reg  <= crc_next;
    75                                               
    76                                                               if (i_end)
    77              1                       2901                         crc_state <= 2'd1;
    78                                               
    79                                                           // STATE 1: Receive CRC LSB
    80                                                           end else if (crc_state == 2'd1 && i_data_valid) begin
    81              1                       2901                     rx_lsb    <= i_data_in;
    82              1                       2901                     crc_state <= 2'd2;
    83                                               
    84                                                           // STATE 2: Receive CRC MSB and check
    85                                                           end else if (crc_state == 2'd2 && i_data_valid) begin
    86              1                       2901                     o_crc_ok   <= ({i_data_in, rx_lsb} == crc_reg) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;
    87              1                       2901                     o_crc_done <= 1'b1;
    88              1                       2901                     crc_state  <= 2'd0;

    3                                                module csi2_rx_unpacker #(
    4                                                    parameter MAX_PIXEL_WIDTH = 24
    5                                                )(
    6                                                    // Clocks and Resets
    7                                                    input  wire                         i_byte_clk,
    8                                                    input  wire                         i_rst_n,
    9                                                
    10                                                   // Configuration
    11                                                   input  wire [5:0]                   i_cfg_data_type,
    12                                               
    13                                                   // Byte Input Interface (From Depacketizer)
    14                                                   input  wire [7:0]                   i_rx_data,
    15                                                   input  wire                         i_rx_valid,
    16                                                   input  wire                         i_rx_packet_done,
    17                                                   input  wire                         i_rx_frame_start,
    18                                               
    19                                                   // Native Output Interface (To Async FIFO)
    20                                                   output wire [MAX_PIXEL_WIDTH-1:0]   o_native_data,
    21                                                   output wire                         o_native_valid,
    22                                                   output wire                         o_native_sof,
    23                                                   output wire                         o_native_eol
    24                                               );
    25                                               
    26                                                   // =========================================================================
    27                                                   // Internal Signals & Types
    28                                                   // =========================================================================
    29                                                   
    30                                                   // Data Type decoding
    31              1                         83         wire is_raw8  = (i_cfg_data_type == 6'h2A);
    32              1                         83         wire is_2byte = (i_cfg_data_type == 6'h1E) || (i_cfg_data_type == 6'h22);
    33              1                         83         wire is_3byte = (i_cfg_data_type == 6'h24);
    34              1                         83         wire is_raw10 = (i_cfg_data_type == 6'h2B);
    35                                               
    36                                                   // Byte Accumulator
    37                                                   reg [2:0] byte_cnt;
    38                                                   reg [7:0] r_byte0, r_byte1, r_byte2, r_byte3;
    39                                                   
    40                                                   // SOF Tracker
    41                                                   reg r_pending_sof;
    42                                               
    43                                                   // 4-Stage Output Shift Register (Queue)
    44                                                   // Sized to handle the maximum burst of 4 pixels (RAW10)
    45                                                   reg [MAX_PIXEL_WIDTH-1:0] sr_data  [0:3];
    46                                                   reg                       sr_valid [0:3];
    47                                                   reg                       sr_sof   [0:3];
    48                                                   reg                       sr_eol   [0:3];
    49                                               
    50                                                   // =========================================================================
    51                                                   // Load Enable Logic
    52                                                   // =========================================================================
    53                                                   // Triggers when a full pixel (or group of pixels) is completely assembled.
    54              1                    8385889         wire load_en = i_rx_valid && (
    55                                                       is_raw8 ||
    56                                                       (is_2byte && byte_cnt == 3'd1) ||
    57                                                       (is_3byte && byte_cnt == 3'd2) ||
    58                                                       (is_raw10 && byte_cnt == 3'd4)
    59                                                   );
    60                                               
    61                                                   // =========================================================================
    62                                                   // Byte Accumulator Process
    63                                                   // =========================================================================
    64              1                    9705265         always @(posedge i_byte_clk or negedge i_rst_n) begin
    65                                                       if (!i_rst_n) begin
    66              1                        218                 byte_cnt <= 3'd0;
    67              1                        218                 r_byte0 <= 8'h00; r_byte1 <= 8'h00; 
    67              2                        218     
    68              1                        218                 r_byte2 <= 8'h00; r_byte3 <= 8'h00;
    68              2                        218     
    69                                                       end else if (i_rx_valid) begin
    70                                                           if (load_en) begin
    71              1                    4570917                     byte_cnt <= 3'd0; // Reset counter for the next pixel/group
    72                                                           end else begin
    73              1                    5100000                     byte_cnt <= byte_cnt + 1'b1;
    74                                                               case (byte_cnt)
    75              1                    3275000                         3'd0: r_byte0 <= i_rx_data;
    76              1                    1275000                         3'd1: r_byte1 <= i_rx_data;
    77              1                     275000                         3'd2: r_byte2 <= i_rx_data;
    78              1                     275000                         3'd3: r_byte3 <= i_rx_data;
    79                                                               endcase
    80                                                           end
    81                                                       end
    82                                                   end
    83                                               
    84                                                   // =========================================================================
    85                                                   // Output Shift Register & Formatting Logic
    86                                                   // =========================================================================
    87                                                   
    88                                                   // [FIX]: Combinational bypass for SOF flag to prevent 1-cycle race conditions
    89              1                        197         wire w_current_sof = r_pending_sof | i_rx_frame_start;
    90                                               
    91                                                   integer i;
    92              1                    9715521         always @(posedge i_byte_clk or negedge i_rst_n) begin
    93                                                       if (!i_rst_n) begin
    94              1                        218                 for (i = 0; i < 4; i = i + 1) begin
    94              2                        872     
    95              1                        872                     sr_data[i]  <= 0;
    96              1                        872                     sr_valid[i] <= 0;
    97              1                        872                     sr_sof[i]   <= 0;
    98              1                        872                     sr_eol[i]   <= 0;
    99                                                           end
    100             1                        218                 r_pending_sof <= 0;
    101                                                      end else begin
    102                                                          // 1. Track Frame Start Pulse
    103                                                          if (i_rx_frame_start) begin
    104                                                              // [FIX]: If loading right now, consume instantly. Otherwise, hold.
    105             1                         15                     if (load_en) r_pending_sof <= 1'b0; 
    106             1                         41                     else         r_pending_sof <= 1'b1;
    107                                                          end 
    108                                                          else if (load_en) begin
    109             1                    4575962                     r_pending_sof <= 1'b0; // Clears as it attaches to the first pixel
    110                                                          end
    111                                              
    112                                                          // 2. Load or Shift
    113                                                          if (load_en) begin
    114                                                              // OVERWRITE Shift Register with fully constructed pixel(s)
    115                                                              if (is_raw8) begin
    116             1                    1300977                         sr_data[0] <= i_rx_data;
    117             1                    1300977                         sr_valid[0] <= 1'b1;
    118             1                    1300977                         sr_sof[0] <= w_current_sof; // [FIX]: Use combinational bypass
    119             1                    1300977                         sr_eol[0] <= i_rx_packet_done;
    120                                                                  
    121             1                    1300977                         sr_valid[1] <= 0; sr_valid[2] <= 0; sr_valid[3] <= 0;
    121             2                    1300977     
    121             3                    1300977     
    122                                                              end
    123                                                              else if (is_2byte) begin
    124             1                    2000000                         sr_data[0] <= {r_byte0, i_rx_data}; // MSB first
    125             1                    2000000                         sr_valid[0] <= 1'b1;

    130                                                              end

    154                                                              end
    155                                                          end

    157                                                              // SHIFT DOWN to burst out pixels (used heavily by RAW10)

    8                                                    // =========================================================================
    9                                                    // System Signals
    10                                                   // =========================================================================
    11                                                   // spyglass disable_block W240

    22                                                   input  wire                                i_pix_user,  // Start of Frame
    23                                                   input  wire                                i_pix_valid, // Data Valid
    24                                                   output wire                                o_pix_ready, // Backpressure to FIFO
    25                                               
    26                                                   // =========================================================================

    28                                                   // =========================================================================
    29                                                   output wire [P_AXI_WIDTH-1:0]              m_axis_tdata,

    32                                                   output wire                                m_axis_tuser, // User Signal (SOF)
    33                                                   output wire                                m_axis_tvalid,

    41                                                   // The upper bits are padded with Zeros (0x00).

    44

    72                                                   wire rx_crc_ok, rx_crc_done, rx_ecc_single, rx_ecc_double;
    73                                               
    74                                                   // =========================================================================
    75                                                   // Error Injection Signals
    76                                                   // =========================================================================
    77                                                   // CRC injection: XOR mask applied to the two CRC bytes on the serial bus
    78                                                   // ECC injection: intercept header going into ECC RX decoder
    79                                                   logic [15:0] crc_inject_mask   = 16'h0000; // bits to flip in CRC field
    80                                                   logic        crc_inject_en     = 1'b0;
    81                                               
    82                                                   // ECC header injection – we force the header word seen by the ECC module
    83                                                   logic        ecc_inject_en     = 1'b0;
    84                                                   logic [31:0] ecc_inject_mask   = 32'h0000_0000; // bits to flip in 32-bit header
    85                                               
    86                                                   // =========================================================================
    87                                                   // I2C Signals & Pull-ups
    88                                                   // =========================================================================
    89                                                   logic i2c_scl_drv = 1;
    90                                                   logic i2c_sda_drv = 1;
    91                                                   wire  i2c_sda_bus;
    92              1                      12193         assign i2c_sda_bus = i2c_sda_drv ? 1'bz : 1'b0;
    93                                                   pullup(i2c_sda_bus);
    94                                               
    95                                                   // Bridge the unlinked packetizer data into the Digital Top
    96              1                    9666502         assign dig_tx_pkt_data_in = dut.u_csi2_tx_top.w_pkt_data;
    97              1                      11026         assign dig_tx_pkt_vld_in  = dut.u_csi2_tx_top.w_pkt_valid;
    98                                               
    99                                                   // =========================================================================
    100                                                  // DUT Instantiation
    101                                                  // =========================================================================
    102                                                  mipi_system_top dut (
    103                                                      .sys_clk(sys_clk),             .sys_rst_n(sys_rst_n),
    104                                                      .pclk(pclk),                   .preset_n(preset_n),
    105                                                      .pixel_clk(pixel_clk),         .pixel_rst_n(pixel_rst_n),
    106                                                      .byte_clk(byte_clk),           .byte_rst_n(byte_rst_n),
    107

    109                                                      .cfg_frame_lines(cfg_frame_lines),
    110                                                      .cfg_rx_data_type(cfg_rx_data_type),
    111

    113                                                      .i2c_sda(i2c_sda_bus), 
    114

    116                                                      .tx_apb_pwrite(tx_apb_pwrite), .tx_apb_paddr(tx_apb_paddr),
    117                                                      .tx_apb_pwdata(tx_apb_pwdata), .tx_apb_prdata(tx_apb_prdata),

    119

    122                                                      .rx_apb_pwdata(rx_apb_pwdata), .rx_apb_prdata(rx_apb_prdata),

    128

    131                                                      .rx_axis_tvalid(rx_axis_tvalid), .rx_axis_tready(rx_axis_tready),
    132                                              
    133                                                      .tx_lane0_data_out(tx_lane0_data_out), .tx_lane0_vld_out(tx_lane0_vld_out),
    134                                                      .tx_lane1_data_out(tx_lane1_data_out), .tx_lane1_vld_out(tx_lane1_vld_out),
    135                                                      .tx_lane2_data_out(tx_lane2_data_out), .tx_lane2_vld_out(tx_lane2_vld_out),

    139

    189                                                  logic clk_phy_pll = 0;
    190                                                  real phy_half_period = 3.125; 
    191                                                  
    192             1                         45         always @(*) begin
    193             1                         15             if      (cfg_active_lanes == 3'd4) phy_half_period = 3.125;  // 6.25ns period
    194             1                         15             else if (cfg_active_lanes == 3'd2) phy_half_period = 6.250;  // 12.5ns period
    195             1                         15             else                               phy_half_period = 12.50;  // 25.0ns period
    196                                                  end
    197             1                  227686333         always #phy_half_period clk_phy_pll = ~clk_phy_pll;
    197             2                  227686332     
    198                                              
    199                                                  dphy_behavioral u_dphy (
    200                                                      .i_clk_pll(clk_phy_pll), .i_rst_n(sys_rst_n),
    201                                                      .i_TxClkRequestHS(ppi_tx_ClkRequestHS), .o_TxClkReadyHS(ppi_tx_ClkReadyHS), .o_TxByteClkHS(ppi_tx_ByteClkHS),
    202                                                      .i_TxRequestHS(ppi_tx_RequestHS), .o_TxReadyHS(ppi_tx_ReadyHS),
    203                                                      .i_TxDataHS_0(ppi_tx_DataHS_0), .i_TxDataHS_1(ppi_tx_DataHS_1), .i_TxDataHS_2(ppi_tx_DataHS_2), .i_TxDataHS_3(ppi_tx_DataHS_3),
    204                                                      .i_TxValidHS_0(ppi_tx_ValidHS_0), .i_TxValidHS_1(ppi_tx_ValidHS_1), .i_TxValidHS_2(ppi_tx_ValidHS_2), .i_TxValidHS_3(ppi_tx_ValidHS_3),

    210                                                  );

    213                                                  // Clocks Generation (Real SDC Timings)
    214                                                  // =========================================================================
    215             1                  108988858         always #10.00 pclk      = ~pclk;      // 20.00 ns (50 MHz)
    215             2                  108988857     
    216             1                   43595544         always #25 pixel_clk = ~pixel_clk; // 25.00 ns (40 MHz)
    216             2                   43595543     
    217             1                   87191087         always #12.5 byte_clk  = ~byte_clk;  // 25.00 ns (40 MHz) 
    217             2                   87191086     
    218                                              
    219                                                  real sys_half_period = 3.125;
    220             1                         45         always @(*) begin
    221             1                         15             if      (cfg_active_lanes == 3'd4) sys_half_period = 6.25 / 2.0;  // 160 MHz
    222             1                         15             else if (cfg_active_lanes == 3'd2) sys_half_period = 12.50 / 2.0; // 80 MHz
    223             1                         15             else                               sys_half_period = 25.00 / 2.0; // 40 MHz
    224                                                  end
    225             1                  227686333         always #sys_half_period sys_clk = ~sys_clk;
    225             2                  227686332     
    226                                              
    227                                                  // =========================================================================
    228                                                  // I2C Master Bit-Banging Tasks 
    229                                                  // =========================================================================
    230                                                  task automatic i2c_start;
    231                                                      begin
    232             1                        648                 i2c_sda_drv = 0; #100;
    232             2                        648     
    233             1                        648                 i2c_scl_drv = 0; #100;
    233             2                        648     
    234                                                      end
    235                                                  endtask
    236                                              
    237                                                  task automatic i2c_stop;
    238                                                      begin
    239             1                        648                 i2c_sda_drv = 0; #100;
    239             2                        648     
    240             1                        648                 i2c_scl_drv = 1; #100;
    240             2                        648     
    241             1                        648                 i2c_sda_drv = 1; #100;
    241             2                        648     
    242                                                      end
    243                                                  endtask
    244                                              
    245                                                  task automatic i2c_write_byte(input logic [7:0] data);
    246                                                      begin
    247             1                       2592                 for (int i = 7; i >= 0; i--) begin
    247             2                      20736     
    248             1                      20736                     i2c_sda_drv = data[i]; #100;
    248             2                      20736     
    249             1                      20736                     i2c_scl_drv = 1;       #200;
    249             2                      20736     
    250             1                      20736                     i2c_scl_drv = 0;       #100;
    250             2                      20736     
    251                                                          end
    252             1                       2592                 i2c_sda_drv = 1; #100;
    252             2                       2592     
    253             1                       2592                 i2c_scl_drv = 1; #200;
    253             2                       2592     
    254             1                       2592                 i2c_scl_drv = 0; #100;
    254             2                       2592     
    255                                                      end
    256                                                  endtask
    257                                              
    258                                                  task automatic i2c_write_reg(input logic [6:0] slave_addr, input logic [15:0] reg_addr, input logic [7:0] data);
    259                                                      begin
    260             1                        648                 i2c_start();
    261             1                        648                 i2c_write_byte({slave_addr, 1'b0}); 
    262             1                        648                 i2c_write_byte(reg_addr[15:8]);     
    263             1                        648                 i2c_write_byte(reg_addr[7:0]);      
    264             1                        648                 i2c_write_byte(data);               
    265             1                        648                 i2c_stop();
    266             1                        648                 #1000; 
    267                                                      end
    268                                                  endtask
    269                                              
    270                                                  // =========================================================================
    271                                                  // DEBUG & TRACKING MONITORS
    272                                                  // =========================================================================
    273                                                  logic ppi_rx_SyncHS_0_d = 0;
    274                                                  logic [3:0] sync_delay_sr = 0;
    275                                              
    276             1                    6951515         always @(posedge byte_clk) begin
    277                                                      if (!sys_rst_n) begin
    278             1                         55                 sync_delay_sr <= 0;
    279             1                         55                 ppi_rx_SyncHS_0_d <= 0;
    280                                                      end else begin
    281             1                    6951460                 ppi_rx_SyncHS_0_d <= ppi_rx_SyncHS_0;
    282             1                    6951460                 sync_delay_sr <= {sync_delay_sr[2:0], (ppi_rx_SyncHS_0 && !ppi_rx_SyncHS_0_d)};
    283                                                      end
    284                                              
    285                                                      if (rx_crc_done) begin
    286             1                       2898                 if (rx_crc_ok) $display("[DBG:RX-CHK] @%0t | Payload CRC Check PASSED.", $time);
    287             1                          3                 else           $display("[DBG:RX-ERR] @%0t | Payload CRC Check FAILED!", $time);
    288                                                      end
    289                                                  end
    290                                              
    291                                                  // =========================================================================
    292                                                  // Memories, Pointers & Scoreboard Logic
    293                                                  // =========================================================================
    294                                                  csi_coverage cov;
    295                                                  logic [33:0] tx_mem [0:MEM_DEPTH-1];
    296                                                  logic [33:0] rx_mem [0:MEM_DEPTH-1];
    297                                                  int tx_ptr = 0, rx_ptr = 0;
    298                                                  int frames_sent = 0, crc_pass_cnt = 0, crc_fail_cnt = 0, ecc_fixed_cnt = 0, ecc_err_cnt = 0;
    299                                              
    300             1                    5910677         always @(posedge pixel_clk) begin
    301                                                      if (rx_axis_tvalid && rx_axis_tready && rx_ptr < MEM_DEPTH)
    302             1                    5400526                 rx_mem[rx_ptr++] = {rx_axis_tuser, rx_axis_tlast, rx_axis_tdata};
    303                                                  end
    304                                                  logic rx_ecc_single_d, rx_ecc_double_d;
    305                                              
    306             1                   43595543         always @(posedge byte_clk) begin
    307             1                   43595543             rx_ecc_single_d <= rx_ecc_single;
    308             1                   43595543         rx_ecc_double_d <= rx_ecc_double;
    309                                                      if (rx_crc_done) begin
    310             1                       2901                 cov.sample_rx_status(rx_crc_ok, rx_ecc_single, rx_ecc_double);
    311             1                       2898                 if (rx_crc_ok) crc_pass_cnt++;
    312             1                          3                 else           crc_fail_cnt++;
    313                                                      end
    314                                                      /*
    315                                                      // ECC signals are one-cycle pulses from the ECC decoder – count and
    316                                                      // display them directly on byte_clk without sync_delay_sr gating.
    317                                                      if (rx_ecc_single) begin
    318                                                          ecc_fixed_cnt++;
    319                                                          $display("[DBG:RX-ERR] @%0t | ECC Single-Bit Error CORRECTED.", $time);
    320                                                      end
    321                                                      if (rx_ecc_double) begin
    322                                                          ecc_err_cnt++;
    323                                                          $display("[DBG:RX-ERR] @%0t | ECC Double-Bit Error DETECTED.", $time);
    324                                                      end
    325                                                      */
    326                                              
    327                                                  if (rx_ecc_single && !rx_ecc_single_d) begin  // rising edge only
    328             1                          1             ecc_fixed_cnt++;
    329             1                          1             $display("[DBG:RX-ERR] @%0t | ECC Single-Bit Error CORRECTED.", $time);
    330                                                  end
    331                                                  if (rx_ecc_double && !rx_ecc_double_d) begin  // rising edge only
    332             1                          1             ecc_err_cnt++;
    333             1                          1             $display("[DBG:RX-ERR] @%0t | ECC Double-Bit Error DETECTED.", $time);
    334                                                  end
    335                                                  end
    336                                              
    337                                                  // =========================================================================
    338                                                  // APB Write Tasks
    339                                                  // =========================================================================
    340                                                  task automatic tx_apb_write(input logic [31:0] addr, input logic [31:0] data);
    341             1                        162             @(posedge pclk);
    342             1                        162             tx_apb_psel = 1; tx_apb_pwrite = 1; tx_apb_paddr = addr; tx_apb_pwdata = data; tx_apb_penable = 0;
    342             2                        162     
    342             3                        162     
    342             4                        162     
    342             5                        162     
    343             1                        162             @(posedge pclk); tx_apb_penable = 1;
    343             2                        162     
    344             1                        162             @(posedge pclk); while (!tx_apb_pready) @(posedge pclk);
    344             2                        162     
    344             3                    ***0***     
    345             1                        162             tx_apb_psel = 0; tx_apb_penable = 0; tx_apb_pwrite = 0;
    345             2                        162     
    345             3                        162     
    346                                                  endtask
    347                                              
    348                                                  task automatic rx_apb_write(input logic [31:0] addr, input logic [31:0] data);
    349             1                        162             @(posedge pclk);
    350             1                        162             rx_apb_psel = 1; rx_apb_pwrite = 1; rx_apb_paddr = addr; rx_apb_pwdata = data; rx_apb_penable = 0;
    350             2                        162     
    350             3                        162     
    350             4                        162     
    350             5                        162     
    351             1                        162             @(posedge pclk); rx_apb_penable = 1;
    351             2                        162     
    352             1                        162             @(posedge pclk); while (!rx_apb_pready) @(posedge pclk);
    352             2                        162     
    352             3                    ***0***     
    353             1                        162             rx_apb_psel = 0; rx_apb_penable = 0; rx_apb_pwrite = 0;
    353             2                        162     
    353             3                        162     
    354                                                  endtask
    355                                                  // =========================================================================
    356                                                  // Helper: Calculate Word Count (Bytes) from Data Type
    357                                                  // =========================================================================
    358                                                  function automatic int get_word_count(logic [5:0] dt);
    359                                                      case(dt)
    360             1                          1                 DT_RAW8:   return 1* NUM_PIXELS; // 1000 pixels * 1 byte
    361             1                          1                 DT_RAW10:  return 1.25 * NUM_PIXELS; // 1000 pixels * 1.25 bytes
    362             1                          1                 DT_YUV422: return 2 * NUM_PIXELS; // 1000 pixels * 2 bytes
    363             1                          1                 DT_RGB565: return 2 * NUM_PIXELS;// 1000 pixels * 2 bytes
    364             1                          1                 DT_RGB888: return 3 * NUM_PIXELS; // 1000 pixels * 3 bytes
    365             1                    ***0***                 default:   return 1 * NUM_PIXELS;
    366                                                      endcase
    367                                                  endfunction
    368                                                      // =========================================================================
    369                                                  // Re-initialisation Task (????? ?????? ?? I2C ??? ?? Force)
    370                                                  // =========================================================================
    371                                                 task automatic reinit(
    372                                                      input logic [5:0] dt, 
    373                                                      input int word_count,       
    374                                                      input logic [2:0] lanes, 
    375                                                      input logic crc_en, 
    376                                                      input logic scram_en,
    377                                                      input string label
    378                                                  );
    379             1                         54             logic [15:0] wc_16 = word_count; 
    380                                                      logic [1:0]  encoded_lanes;
    381                                              
    382             1                         54             encoded_lanes = (lanes == 4) ? 2'b11 : (lanes == 2) ? 2'b01 : 2'b00;
    383                                              
    384             1                         54             $display("\n-------------------------------------------------------------");
    385             1                         54             $display("[INIT] %s", label);
    386             1                         54             $display("-------------------------------------------------------------");
    387                                              
    388                                                      // --- 1. HARD RESET BEFORE CLOCK CHANGES ---
    389             1                         54             sys_rst_n = 0; preset_n = 0; pixel_rst_n = 0; byte_rst_n = 0;
    389             2                         54     
    389             3                         54     
    389             4                         54     
    390             1                         54             #200; // Hold reset while clocks are potentially unstable
    391                                              
    392                                                      // --- 2. UPDATE CONFIGURATION (Causes instant Clock Scaling) ---
    393             1                         54             cfg_rx_data_type = dt;
    394             1                         54             cfg_active_lanes = lanes;
    395             1                         54             cfg_frame_lines  = NUM_LINES;
    396                                                      
    397             1                         54             #200; // Allow scaled clocks to stabilize
    398                                              
    399                                                      // --- 3. RELEASE RESETS ---
    400             1                         54             sys_rst_n = 1; preset_n = 1; pixel_rst_n = 1; byte_rst_n = 1;
    400             2                         54     
    400             3                         54     
    400             4                         54     
    401             1                       1080             repeat(20) @(posedge sys_clk);
    401             2                       1080     
    402                                              
    403                                                      // --- 4. SOFT RESET ---
    404             1                         54             tx_apb_write(32'h0000_0000, 32'h0000_0002);
    405             1                         54             rx_apb_write(32'h0000_0000, 32'h0000_0002);
    406             1                        540             repeat(10) @(posedge pclk);
    406             2                        540     
    407                                              
    408             1                         54            $display("[DBG:I2C] Writing TX Configuration (Slave 0x50)...");
    409             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h50, 16'h0000, wc_16[7:0]);          // <--- Changed
    410             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h50, 16'h0001, wc_16[15:8]);         // <--- Changed
    411             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h50, 16'h0002, {2'b00, dt});
    412             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h50, 16'h0003, {6'd0, encoded_lanes});
    413             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h50, 16'h0004, NUM_LINES[15:8]);   
    414             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h50, 16'h0005, NUM_LINES[7:0]);    
    415                                              
    416             1                         54             $display("[DBG:I2C] Writing RX Configuration (Slave 0x55)...");
    417             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h55, 16'h0000, {2'b00, dt});
    418             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h55, 16'h0001, {6'd0, encoded_lanes});
    419             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h55, 16'h0002, NUM_LINES[15:8]);   
    420             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h55, 16'h0003, NUM_LINES[7:0]);    
    421             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h55, 16'h0004, wc_16[15:8]);         // <--- Changed
    422             1                         54             i2c_write_reg(7'h55, 16'h0005, wc_16[7:0]);          // <--- Changed
    423                                              
    424                                              
    425             1                         54             tx_apb_write(32'h0000_0004, {30'd0, crc_en, scram_en});
    426             1                         54             rx_apb_write(32'h0000_0004, {30'd0, crc_en, scram_en});
    427             1                        270             repeat(5) @(posedge pclk);
    427             2                        270     
    428                                              
    429             1                         54             tx_apb_write(32'h0000_0000, 32'h0000_0001);
    430             1                         54             rx_apb_write(32'h0000_0000, 32'h0000_0001);
    431                                              
    432             1                      27000             repeat(500) @(posedge byte_clk); 
    432             2                      27000     
    433                                                  endtask
    434                                              
    435                                                 // =========================================================================
    436                                                  // AXI Data Generation Tasks
    437                                                  // =========================================================================
    438                                              task automatic send_line(input logic [7:0] base_val, input bit is_sof, input bit is_eol, input int current_wc, input logic [5:0] dt,input logic crc_en, input logic scram_en);
    439                                                      logic [31:0] rand_val;
    440                                                      bit expected_rx_tuser;
    441                                                      bit current_tlast;
    442                                                      
    443                                                      begin
    444                                                          // AXI-Stream always operates in PIXELS. Loop exactly NUM_PIXELS times!
    445             1                       5402                 for (int i = 0; i < NUM_PIXELS; i++) begin
    445             2                    5402000     
    446                                                              // Generate all 32 random bits – send them ALL to the DUT and store
    447                                                              // ALL 32 bits in tx_mem. compare_memories will mask per DT later.
    448             1                    5402000                     rand_val = $urandom();
    449             1                    5402000                     expected_rx_tuser = (i == 0) ? is_sof : 1'b0;
    450                                                              
    451                                                              // Assert tlast on the final PIXEL of the line
    452             1                    5402000                     current_tlast = (i == NUM_PIXELS - 1) ? is_eol : 1'b0;
    453                                              
    454             1                    5402000                     cov.sample_tx(cfg_active_lanes, dt, expected_rx_tuser, current_tlast, crc_en, scram_en);
    455             1                    5402000                     tx_axis_tvalid <= 1'b1;
    456             1                    5402000                     tx_axis_tdata  <= rand_val;      // full 32 bits to DUT
    457             1                    5402000                     tx_axis_tuser  <= expected_rx_tuser;
    458             1                    5402000                     tx_axis_tlast  <= current_tlast;
    459                                              
    460             1                    5402000                     do begin
    461             1                    5402000                         @(posedge pixel_clk);
    462                                                              end while (tx_axis_tready !== 1'b1);
    463                                              
    464                                                              if (tx_ptr < MEM_DEPTH) begin
    465             1                    5402000                         tx_mem[tx_ptr++] = {expected_rx_tuser, current_tlast, rand_val}; // store 32 bits
    466                                                              end
    467                                                          end
    468                                                          
    469             1                       5402                 tx_axis_tvalid <= 1'b0;
    470             1                       5402                 tx_axis_tuser  <= 1'b0;
    471             1                       5402                 tx_axis_tlast  <= 1'b0;
    472                                                      end
    473                                                  endtask
    474                                                  task automatic send_frame(input logic [7:0] base_data, input string frame_name, input int current_wc, input logic [5:0] dt, input logic crc_en, input logic scram_en);
    475                                                      int tx_start;
    476                                                      int rx_start;
    477                                                      
    478                                                      begin
    479             1                         54                 tx_start = tx_ptr;
    480             1                         54                 rx_start = rx_ptr;
    481                                              
    482             1                         54                 $display("\n[SIM ] ================================================");
    483             1                         54                 $display("[SIM ] %s (Word Count: %0d)", frame_name, current_wc);
    484                                                          
    485                                              
    486             1                         54                 for (int ln = 0; ln < NUM_LINES; ln++) begin
    486             2                       5400     
    487             1                   16038000                     if (ln > 0) repeat(3000) @(posedge pixel_clk);
    487             2                   16038000     
    488                                                              // Pass current_wc and dt down to send_line
    489             1                       5400                     send_line(base_data + 8'(ln * 8'h10), (ln == 0), 1'b1, current_wc, dt, crc_en, scram_en);
    490                                                          end
    491                                              
    492             1                     270000                 repeat(5000) @(posedge byte_clk); 
    492             2                     270000     
    493                                                          
    494             1                         54                 frames_sent++;
    495             1                         54                 $display("[SIM ] %s DONE (Sent: %0d | Received: %0d words)", frame_name, tx_ptr-tx_start, rx_ptr-rx_start);
    496                                                      end
    497                                                  endtask
    498                                              
    499                                                  // Helper: return the bit-mask for valid pixel bits for a given data type
    500                                                  function automatic logic [31:0] pixel_mask(input logic [5:0] dt);
    501                                                      case(dt)
    502             1                         10                 DT_RAW8:   return 32'h0000_00FF;   //  8 bits
    503             1                         11                 DT_RAW10:  return 32'h0000_03FF;   // 10 bits
    504             1                         10                 DT_YUV422: return 32'h0000_FFFF;   // 16 bits
    505             1                         10                 DT_RGB565: return 32'h0000_FFFF;   // 16 bits
    506             1                         10                 DT_RGB888: return 32'h00FF_FFFF;   // 24 bits
    507             1                    ***0***                 default:   return 32'h0000_00FF;
    508                                                      endcase
    509                                                  endfunction
    510                                              
    511                                                  task automatic compare_memories(input int start_idx, input int count, input string label, input logic [5:0] dt);
    512                                                      int mismatches;
    513                                                      logic [31:0] mask;
    514                                                      logic [31:0] tx_pix, rx_pix;
    515                                                      
    516                                                      begin
    517             1                         51                 mismatches = 0;
    518             1                         51                 mask = pixel_mask(dt);
    519                                                          
    520             1                         51                 $display("\n[CMP ] --- %s (mask=0x%08X, %0d valid bits) ---", label, mask, $clog2(mask+1));
    521             1                         51                 for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) begin
    521             2                    5100000     
    522                                                              // Compare only sideband bits and the valid pixel bits per DT
    523             1                    5100000                     tx_pix = tx_mem[start_idx+i][31:0] & mask;
    524             1                    5100000                     rx_pix = rx_mem[start_idx+i][31:0] & mask;
    525                                              
    526                                                              if ((tx_mem[start_idx+i][33:32] !== rx_mem[start_idx+i][33:32]) ||
    527                                                                  (tx_pix !== rx_pix)) begin
    528             1                    ***0***                         mismatches++;
    529                                                                  
    530             1                    ***0***                         $display("[CMP ]   MISMATCH idx=%0d  TX={SOF:%b, EOL:%b, D:0x%08X (masked:0x%08X)}  RX={SOF:%b, EOL:%b, D:0x%08X (masked:0x%08X)}", 
    531                                                                      start_idx+i, 
    532                                                                      tx_mem[start_idx+i][33], tx_mem[start_idx+i][32], tx_mem[start_idx+i][31:0], tx_pix,
    533                                                                      rx_mem[start_idx+i][33], rx_mem[start_idx+i][32], rx_mem[start_idx+i][31:0], rx_pix
    534                                                                  );
    535                                                                  
    536             1                    ***0***                         $display("\n>>> [FATAL] Data mismatch detected! Pausing simulation. <<<");
    537             1                    ***0***                         $stop; 
    538                                                              end
    539                                                          end
    540             1                         51                 if (mismatches == 0) $display("[CMP ]   [PASS] All %0d pixels match (DT mask=0x%08X)", count, mask);
    541                                                      end
    542                                                  endtask
    543                                              
    544                                                  // =========================================================================
    545                                                  // Error Injection — Module-level static registers
    546                                                  // (force/release cannot reference variables inside automatic tasks)
    547                                                  // =========================================================================
    548                                                  `define CRC_RX_PATH dut.u_csi2_rx_top.u_crc_rx
    549                                                  `define ECC_RX_PATH dut.u_csi2_rx_top.u_ecc_rx
    550                                              
    551                                                  // Static registers that hold the computed XOR values for force statements
    552                                                  logic [7:0]  crc_lsb_forced;   // corrupted LSB value
    553                                                  logic [7:0]  crc_msb_xor;      // XOR value for MSB (applied combinationally)
    554                                                  logic [31:0] ecc_hdr_forced;   // corrupted header value
    555                                              
    556                                                  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    557                                                  // CRC injection: corrupt the two received CRC bytes inside crc_rx.
    558                                                  // flip_mask[7:0]  → bits to flip in the LSB byte (rx_lsb register)
    559                                                  // flip_mask[15:8] → bits to flip in the MSB byte (i_data_in when state==2)
    560                                                  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    561                                                  task inject_crc_error;   // NOT automatic – so force is legal
    562                                                      input [15:0] flip_mask;
    563                                                      input [63:0] label_unused; // label skipped; use caller's $display
    564                                                      begin
    565                                                          // Wait for state 1: CRC LSB is being latched this cycle
    566             1                          3                 @(posedge byte_clk iff (`CRC_RX_PATH.crc_state === 2'd1 &&
    567                                                                                  `CRC_RX_PATH.i_data_valid === 1'b1));
    568             1                          3                 crc_lsb_forced = `CRC_RX_PATH.i_data_in ^ flip_mask[7:0];
    569             1                          3                 force `CRC_RX_PATH.rx_lsb = crc_lsb_forced;
    570             1                          3                 @(posedge byte_clk);
    571             1                          3                 release `CRC_RX_PATH.rx_lsb;
    572                                              
    573                                                          // Wait for state 2: CRC MSB arrives – flip it before comparison
    574             1                          3                 @(posedge byte_clk iff (`CRC_RX_PATH.crc_state === 2'd2 &&
    575                                                                                  `CRC_RX_PATH.i_data_valid === 1'b1));
    576             1                          3                 crc_msb_xor = `CRC_RX_PATH.i_data_in ^ flip_mask[15:8];
    577             1                          3                 force `CRC_RX_PATH.i_data_in = crc_msb_xor;
    578             1                          3                 @(posedge byte_clk);
    579             1                          3                 release `CRC_RX_PATH.i_data_in;
    580                                                      end
    581                                                  endtask
    582                                              
    583                                                  task inject_crc_1bit;
    584                                                      input integer bit_pos;
    585                                                      logic [15:0] mask;
    586                                                      begin
    587             1                          1                 mask = 16'h0001 << (bit_pos % 16);
    588             1                          1                 $display("[ERR-INJ] CRC-1BIT-FLIP[%0d]: mask=0x%04X", bit_pos, mask);
    589             1                          1                 inject_crc_error(mask, 64'd0);
    590             1                          1                 $display("[ERR-INJ] CRC-1BIT-FLIP[%0d]: done", bit_pos);
    591                                                      end
    592                                                  endtask
    593                                              
    594                                                  task inject_crc_2bit;
    595                                                      input integer bit_a, bit_b;
    596                                                      logic [15:0] mask;
    597                                                      begin
    598             1                          1                 mask = (16'h0001 << (bit_a % 16)) | (16'h0001 << (bit_b % 16));
    599             1                          1                 $display("[ERR-INJ] CRC-2BIT-FLIP[%0d,%0d]: mask=0x%04X", bit_a, bit_b, mask);
    600             1                          1                 inject_crc_error(mask, 64'd0);
    601             1                          1                 $display("[ERR-INJ] CRC-2BIT-FLIP[%0d,%0d]: done", bit_a, bit_b);
    602                                                      end
    603                                                  endtask
    604                                              
    605                                                  task inject_crc_3bit;
    606                                                      input integer bit_a, bit_b, bit_c;
    607                                                      logic [15:0] mask;
    608                                                      begin
    609             1                          1                 mask = (16'h0001 << (bit_a % 16)) |
    610                                                                 (16'h0001 << (bit_b % 16)) |
    611                                                                 (16'h0001 << (bit_c % 16));
    612             1                          1                 $display("[ERR-INJ] CRC-3BIT-FLIP[%0d,%0d,%0d]: mask=0x%04X", bit_a, bit_b, bit_c, mask);
    613             1                          1                 inject_crc_error(mask, 64'd0);
    614             1                          1                 $display("[ERR-INJ] CRC-3BIT-FLIP[%0d,%0d,%0d]: done", bit_a, bit_b, bit_c);
    615                                                      end
    616                                                  endtask
    617                                              
    618                                                  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    619                                                  // ECC injection: corrupt the 32-bit header seen by csi2_ecc_rx.
    620                                                  //
    621                                                  // Root-cause of the previous WARN:
    622                                                  //   inject_ecc_error fired on the SOF/EOF *short* packet header emitted
    623                                                  //   during reinit settling, before send_frame started. The injection was
    624                                                  //   consumed immediately and the ECC counters never saw it.
    625                                                  //
    626                                                  // Fix:
    627                                                  //   A module-level flag `ecc_inject_armed` is raised just before send_frame
    628                                                  //   forks. inject_ecc_error only fires when:
    629                                                  //     (a) the flag is set, AND
    630                                                  //     (b) the incoming header is a LONG packet (DT[5:4] != 2'b00).
    631                                                  //   After one injection the flag is cleared automatically.
    632                                                  //
    633                                                  //   Long-packet DT range: 0x10–0x3F  =>  i_received_header[5:4] != 2'b00
    634                                                  //   Short-packet DT range: 0x00–0x0F =>  i_received_header[5:4] == 2'b00
    635                                                  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    636                                                  logic ecc_inject_armed = 1'b0;  // module-level handshake flag
    637                                              /*
    638                                                  task inject_ecc_error;          // NOT automatic – force is legal
    639                                                      input [31:0] flip_mask;
    640                                                      begin
    641                                                          // Wait until armed AND a long-packet header appears
    642                                                          @(posedge byte_clk iff (
    643                                                              ecc_inject_armed                          === 1'b1 &&
    644                                                              `ECC_RX_PATH.i_header_valid               === 1'b1 &&
    645                                                              `ECC_RX_PATH.i_received_header[5:4]       !== 2'b00  // long packet
    646                                                          ));
